description: You are an agricultural engineer designing a ground-mounted solar photovoltaic array for a rural farm. Create a site plan layout in LibreCAD using millimeters as the unit. The plan must include a 'PANELS' layer (Green, index 3) containing four 10000mm x 2000mm rectangles with lower-left corners at (0, 0), (0, 4000), (0, 8000), and (0, 12000). On an 'ELECTRICAL' layer (Red, index 1), include a 600mm x 600mm combiner box rectangle with its lower-left corner at (11000, 6700) and four conduit lines connecting (10000, 1000), (10000, 5000), (10000, 9000), and (10000, 13000) to the point (11300, 7000). Finally, include a 'BORDER' layer (White, index 7) with a site boundary rectangle defined by corners (-2000, -2000) and (14000, 16000). Save the drawing to ~/Documents/LibreCAD/solar_array_plan.dxf.
